description: Opinionated Plugins for Claude Code & Antigravity
name: virajp-plugins

plugins.description: AI memory system — mine projects and conversations into a searchable palace. 33 MCP tools, auto-save hooks, guided setup.
plugins.name: mempalace

plugins.description: Opinionated Flutter plugin — a `dart` router skill (lean SKILL.md routing to on-demand references: GetX, a Firebase suite of auth/analytics/app-check/crashlytics/messaging/storage, and feature areas of architecture, state, navigation, theming, layouts, animations, maps, webview, webrtc, revenuecat, image handling, http/json, concurrency, caching, testing, flavors, app-size, coverage, build) and a `swift` router skill (Swift, SwiftUI, Xcode), plus `kotlin`, `pubspec`, `analysis-options`, and `internationalization`, and bundled Dart, Kotlin & Swift (SourceKit) language servers. Self-contained — no cross-marketplace dependencies.
plugins.name: flutter

plugins.description: Highly opinionated Claude Code Plugin for solo developers or small team
plugins.name: vwf

plugins.description: Opinionated Markdown & documentation standards — writing style, CHANGELOGs, and mermaid diagrams — that auto-apply to every Markdown file.
plugins.name: markdown

plugins.description: Opinionated mise plugin — the .config/ three-file split (mise.toml / mise.dev.toml / mise.ci.toml) selected by MISE_ENV, tool/env placement, file-based tasks, and the CI node-gpg workaround. Skill auto-applies to mise configs; /mise:scaffold sets up a repo.
plugins.name: mise

plugins.description: Opinionated TypeScript plugin where Effect is mandatory — a `typescript` router skill (lean SKILL.md routing to on-demand references: Effect-TS patterns, Vitest testing, the monorepo build pipeline) plus `package-json`, `pnpm`, and `tsconfig`, and the TypeScript/JavaScript language server.
plugins.name: typescript

plugins.description: Generate GitHub Actions workflows that install every tool through jdx/mise-action (mise only) and support both polyrepo and monorepo layouts — via the /github-actions:workflow command.
plugins.name: github-actions
